Package org.eventb.core.tests.pm

Class ProofComponentTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.BuilderTest
org.eventb.core.tests.pm.AbstractProofTests
org.eventb.core.tests.pm.ProofComponentTests
public class ProofComponentTests extends AbstractProofTests
Unit tests for Proof Components.

    formulaFactorySafe()
    Ensures that a proof component returns the formula factory associated to its proof obligation file.
    private void
    modifyPRFile()

    modifyPSFile()
     
    void
    testCreateDisposeCreate()
    Ensures that one can create twice the same proof attempt, when the first is disposed in the meantime.
    void
    testCreateProofAttempt()
    Ensures that one can create a proof attempt for an existing PO.
    void
    testCreateProofAttemptNoPOFile()
    Ensures that one can not create a proof attempt when there is no PO file.
    void
    testCreateProofAttemptNoPOSequent()
    Ensures that one can not create a proof attempt when there is no PO sequent.
    void
    testCreateProofAttemptThenRemovePO()
    Ensures that one can create a proof attempt for an existing PO, then the proof attempt is still there even if the PO disappears.
    void
    testCreateSameTwice()
    Ensures that one can not create twice the same proof attempt.
    void
    testCreateTwoSameOwner()
    Ensures that one can create two proof attempts for two existing POs with the same owners.
    void
    testCreateTwoSamePO()
    Ensures that one can create two proof attempts for an existing PO with different owners.
    void
    testProofFiles()
    Ensures that the three files associated to a proof component can be retrieved.
    void
    testProofSkeleton()
    Ensures that one can access to a saved proof (here an empty one).
    void
    testRevertPR()
    Ensures that a PR file can be reverted (made consistent) through its proof component.
    void
    testRevertPRPS()
    Ensures that both the PR and PS file can be reverted (made consistent) through their proof component.
    void
    testRevertPS()
    Ensures that a PS file can be reverted (made consistent) through its proof component.
    void
    testSavePR()
    Ensures that a PR file can be saved through its proof component.
    void
    testSavePRPS()
    Ensures that both the PR and PS file can be saved through a proof component.
    void
    testSavePS()
    Ensures that a PS file can be saved through its proof component.
    void
    testSchedulingRule()
    Ensures that the scheduling rule for a Proof Component is correctly constructed.
    void
    testStatus()
    Ensures that one can access to a proof status.
